content.text: Now I need to create the nested directories. Let me create them one level at a time.
All directories created. Now let me write all 11 files in parallel.

All 11 files have been created successfully. Here is a summary of what was created:

**Component Files (4 files) -- `C:\Users\User\nexus-ai\src\components\documents\`:**

1. **`upload-zone.tsx`** -- Drag-and-drop upload component with file type filtering (PDF, PNG, JPG, TIFF, WebP), progress tracking per file, Supabase Storage upload, document record creation, and AI processing trigger via `/api/documents/process`. Displays file size, upload/processing status, and error handling with toast notifications.

2. **`document-card.tsx`** -- Card component for displaying a document in a grid/list. Shows file name, relative timestamp (via date-fns), and a status badge (Pending/Processing/Completed/Failed) with appropriate icons and colors. Links to the document detail page.

3. **`extraction-results.tsx`** -- Displays extracted data fields with confidence scores color-coded (green >= 90%, yellow >= 70%, red < 70%). Includes optional Re-process and Export buttons. Shows field names (humanized from snake_case) with their extracted values.

4. **`template-editor.tsx`** -- Form component for creating/editing extraction templates. Supports template name, description, category selection, and dynamic field management (add/remove/edit fields). Each field has name, type (text/number/date/currency/boolean), description, and required toggle.

**Dashboard Pages (4 files) -- `C:\Users\User\nexus-ai\src\app\(dashboard)\dashboard\`:**

5. **`documents/page.tsx`** -- Server component that lists all documents for the user's organization in a responsive grid. Shows empty state with upload CTA when no documents exist.

6. **`documents/upload/page.tsx`** -- Server component that renders the UploadZone client component. Validates user authentication and organization membership before displaying.

7. **`documents/[id]/page.tsx`** -- Dynamic server component for document detail view. Shows document metadata, status badge, and conditionally renders: ExtractionResults (completed), pending message, processing spinner, or error state.

8. **`templates/page.tsx`** -- Server component that lists all extraction templates for the organization in a card grid with field count display. Empty state with create CTA.

**API Routes (3 files) -- `C:\Users\User\nexus-ai\src\app\api\documents\`:**

9. **`upload/route.ts`** -- POST endpoint for creating document records in Supabase. Validates auth and required fields (file_name, file_url, organization_id).

10. **`process/route.ts`** -- POST endpoint that orchestrates AI document processing: downloads file from Supabase Storage, converts to base64, builds extraction prompt (with optional template fields), calls OpenAI via `extractFromDocument`, updates document status and extracted data, and tracks processing time.

11. **`export/route.ts`** -- POST endpoint supporting JSON and CSV export of extracted data from multiple documents. CSV export aggregates all fields across documents into a unified header row with proper escaping.
